title: Report a Rescue
subtitle: Your report can save a life. Complete the form with the details of the animal in an emergency situation.
descripcion_placeholder: Describe its physical condition, injuries, behavior, size, color, etc. The more details, the better we can help.
map_hint: Click on the map to adjust the location. You can also drag the marker.
optional_data: Optional information (to contact you and provide follow-up)

errors.descripcion_required: Description is required. Tell us what's happening to the animal.
errors.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.general: An error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.geolocation_not_supported: Your browser does not support geolocation
errors.location_permission_denied: Please allow access to your location.

success_message: Thank you for your help. We have notified the nearest entities. Someone will contact you shortly to coordinate assistance.
auto_classify_hint: You can also write the description and the system will automatically classify it.
prioridad_urgente_desc: The animal requires immediate attention. We will act immediately!
prioridad_urgente_recomendacion: Don't move it if it's seriously injured. Call an emergency vet while help arrives.
prioridad_herido_desc: The animal has injuries that require medical attention.
prioridad_herido_recomendacion: Keep your distance if it's scared. Don't try to treat it yourself if it's serious.
prioridad_abandonado_desc: The animal is alone and needs a temporary home or rescue.
prioridad_abandonado_recomendacion: If you can, offer water and food. Don't scare it if it's frightened.
prioridad_otro_desc: The animal doesn't appear to be in immediate danger, but needs help.
prioridad_otro_recomendacion: Observe from a distance. If it's in good condition, it might be a lost pet.
registrar_mascota_desc: Complete the rescued animal's data at {lugar}
condiciones_placeholder: Example: Needs medication, is blind, etc.
rescates_disponibles_desc: These are the rescues reported near your location. Accept those you can handle.
mis_rescates_desc: Rescues you have accepted and are managing.
no_rescates_disponibles_desc: There are no rescues nearby at this time. Please check again later.
no_rescates_asignados_desc: When you accept a rescue, it will appear here.
